calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: EXQ-ISEF-004 rerun: novelty bonus Goldilocks calibration with checkpoint/resume
items.note: Recovery rerun for V3-EXQ-590 after stdout-only false PASS with output_file="" and no evidence manifest. Same pre-registered design: novelty_bonus_weight in [0.1, 0.3, 0.5, 0.7, 1.0], 3 seeds, 1000 episodes, 200 steps. Script now writes a per-arm/seed checkpoint under REE_assembly/evidence/experiments/_partial so a future interruption can resume from completed seed metrics. PARTIAL RESCUE 2026-05-21: checkpoint file lives on ree-cloud-3 only (_partial/.../V3-EXQ-590a.json, 1/15 runs saved ARM_nbw01); do not run on other hosts.

items.title: EXQ-ISEF-005: 4-phase infant curriculum vs flat parameter baselines (GAP-14)
items.note: infant_substrate:GAP-14 closure. PASS confirms ARC-046 (phased residue accumulation via curriculum); unblocks DEV-NEED-008. Phase-2 cutover interrupted Mac run (~62%); no _partial checkpoint -- full rerun.

items.title: MECH-340 persistence/efficacy gate substrate validation
items.note: Substrate readiness for MECH-340 gated persistence (ARC-079/Q-053). Pure-arithmetic 5 sub-tests; default-off gate. Not governance evidence.
